package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for feature_flag_lookup_without_config_abstraction: Handlers or services that query feature flags directly without a focused flag interface.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule033NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule033NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule033NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario033Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule033NegativeService, input Rule033NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
